steps.title: Use Desmos to fit the linear table
steps.content: Enter the two table rows in Desmos as $x_1=[-12,6]$ and $y_1=[-45,45]$. Then type the linear regression row $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=5$ and $b=15$, so the line is $y=5x+15$.

steps.title: Evaluate the requested input
steps.content: The question asks for the value when $x=\frac{1}{4}$. Substitute into $y=5x+15$: $$y=5\left(\frac{1}{4}\right)+15=\frac{5}{4}+15=16.25$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The line $y=5x+15$ passes through both given points: $5(-12)+15=-45$ and $5(6)+15=45$. Therefore the requested value is 16.25.
